Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Reviewer Declined' AND activity != 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'"}"
